product: Dashboard choropleth maps and AI forecast

what_it_does: Choropleth maps available: Choropleth maps are now available for dashboards, allowing users to visualize data across geographical regions with varying colors based on values such as population, income, or other metrics. AI Forecast on line charts: You can now generate a forecast for a line chart (Public Preview). This page explains how to use and customize visualization widgets on AI/BI dashboards.
why_it_matters: Scale function: Choose Linear or Log (Symmetric).
